e1_regen_hint: If you're still unsatisfied, consider writing the reply yourself.
toast_ai_draft_failed: AI reply failed — opened a blank draft instead.
toast_ai_provider_not_configured: No AI provider is configured for this account. Set one up to use AI replies.
pending_empty: Nothing pending — your agents are all caught up.
draft_banner_count: {count, plural, one {# AI draft ready for review} other {# AI drafts ready for review}}
toast_draft_discarded_undo: Draft discarded — you can undo for 5 seconds.
draft_credential_error: Account credentials expired — re-authorize in Settings.
draft_send_failed: Sending failed — the draft is back in your queue.
draft_diff_label: Changes against the original AI draft
draft_no_edits_hint: No edits made — original AI draft
draft_autosave_failed: Auto-save failed — changes may be lost
auth_level_section_desc: How much each account's agent may do on its own. Full Auto unlocks after 50 approved drafts.
e3_confirm_body: This agent will send replies on its own, without waiting for your approval. Drafts that match a locked rule are always held for review:
e3_confirm_risk_money: Mentions of money, payments, or bank details
toast_auto_sent: An AI reply was sent automatically.
trust_demoted_notice: Repeated mis-send reports — this account was moved back to Semi-Auto.
